# Jersey Jumpy

> Family owned and operated bounce house, inflatable slide, obstacle course, and combo bouncer rental company serving all of New Jersey since 2007. NJ DCA certified, fully insured, SIOTO trained operators.

## Contact
- Toll Free: 866-597-6625
- Local: 732-750-8810
- Email: info@jerseyjumpy.com
- Address: PO Box 217, Iselin, NJ 08830
- Website: https://jerseyjumpy.com
- Booking: https://jerseyjumpy.com/contact

## Key Pages
- [All Inflatables](https://jerseyjumpy.com/inflatables): Browse our full inventory of bounce houses, castle bouncers, combo bouncers, wet/dry slides, and obstacle courses
- [Party Packages](https://jerseyjumpy.com/party-packages): Bundled inflatable packages for larger events ($1,300-$2,200)
- [Rates & Deposits](https://jerseyjumpy.com/rates-deposits): Pricing guidelines ($350-$800 depending on unit and location)
- [FAQs](https://jerseyjumpy.com/faqs): Answers about delivery, setup, sizing, weather policy, cancellations, and more
- [Contact & Book](https://jerseyjumpy.com/contact): Request a quote with your party date, time, location, and preferred inflatable
- [Safety Policies](https://jerseyjumpy.com/policies): Rules, loss of power procedures, rain and wind policies
- [Certifications](https://jerseyjumpy.com/certifications): NJ Department of Community Affairs approved, SIOTO certified

## Detailed Content
- [Full Site Content for AI](https://jerseyjumpy.com/llms-full.txt): Complete detailed content in markdown format
